mapper.select:
SELECT member_id AS memberId, email AS email, nickname AS nickname, role AS role, is_active AS active FROM member
WHERE nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY member_id DESC

SELECT r.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS title, m.nickname AS authorNickname, r.is_public AS isPublic, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review rv WHERE rv.recipe_id = r.recipe_id) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report rp WHERE rp.recipe_id = r.recipe_id AND rp.status = 'PENDING') AS reportCount FROM recipe r JOIN member m ON m.member_id = r.author_id WHERE r.author_id IS NOT NULL
AND r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY reportCount DESC, r.created_at DESC

SELECT rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.recipe_id AS recipeId, r.title AS recipeTitle, m.nickname AS authorNickname, rv.rating AS rating, rv.content AS content, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report rp WHERE rp.review_id = rv.review_id AND rp.status = 'PENDING') AS reportCount, rv.created_at AS createdAt FROM review rv JOIN member m ON m.member_id = rv.member_id JOIN recipe r ON r.recipe_id = rv.recipe_id ORDER BY reportCount DESC, rv.created_at DESC

SELECT 'RECIPE' AS targetType, r.recipe_id AS recipeId, NULL AS reviewId, r.title AS title, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT rp.reason ORDER BY rp.reason SEPARATOR ', ') AS reasons, COUNT(*) AS reportCount, MAX(rp.created_at) AS lastReportedAt FROM report rp JOIN recipe r ON r.recipe_id = rp.recipe_id WHERE rp.status = 'PENDING' AND rp.recipe_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY r.recipe_id, r.title UNION ALL SELECT 'REVIEW' AS targetType, rv.recipe_id AS recipeId, rv.review_id AS reviewId, rv.content AS title, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT rp.reason ORDER BY rp.reason SEPARATOR ', ') AS reasons, COUNT(*) AS reportCount, MAX(rp.created_at) AS lastReportedAt FROM report rp JOIN review rv ON rv.review_id = rp.review_id WHERE rp.status = 'PENDING' AND rp.review_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY rv.review_id, rv.recipe_id, rv.content ORDER BY reportCount DESC, lastReportedAt DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT 1 FROM report WHERE status = 'PENDING' GROUP BY recipe_id, review_id ) t
mapper.update: UPDATE report SET status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND status = 'PENDING'
UPDATE report SET status = 'RESOLVED' WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT role FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET role = #{role} WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: SELECT email FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE is_active = 1
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cp.member_id) FROM challenge_participant cp JOIN challenge c ON c.challenge_id = cp.challenge_id WHERE CURDATE() BETWEEN c.start_date AND c.end_date
